Index.title: Made to Measure Blinds & Curtains in Alicante | Installed
Index.description: Made to measure blinds and curtains in Alicante, Elche, Benidorm, Torrevieja. Supply and installation. Free quote in 24h. ☎ +34 900 000 000
Index.h1: Made to Measure Blinds & Curtains in Alicante
Index.hero_subtitle: Manufactured to order · Supply & installation · Free quote in 24h
Index.seo_h2_1: Made to Measure Blinds in Alicante — Supply and Installation
Index.seo_p_1: We are your trusted local company for the supply and installation of made to measure blinds in Alicante and the entire province. By distributing directly from the our factory, we offer premium quality products, featuring durable materials ideal for the Mediterranean climate. Our main added value is that we don't just sell you the product; we take care of everything: we visit your home, take exact measurements, and carry out the professional installation, ensuring a perfect finish.
Index.seo_h3_1: Types of made to measure blinds available in Alicante
Index.seo_p_2: We have an extensive catalogue of blinds designed to suit any need and style. Screen blinds are the perfect choice to reduce heat and UV rays while maintaining exterior views, highly sought after in coastal homes. If you are looking for total darkness for the bedroom, our blackout blinds are the best option. We also offer sheer blinds for warmth, motorised blinds compatible with smart home systems for maximum comfort, thermal blinds for energy savings, and no-drill blinds, the ideal solution for rental properties where drilling is not allowed.
Index.seo_h3_2: Blind installation service in Alicante and province
Index.seo_p_3: Forget about complicated manuals and tools. Our team of professional installers in Alicante travels to your home to ensure your new blinds or curtains are fitted perfectly. With years of experience, we install blinds in living rooms, bedrooms, offices, and large windows with total safety and guarantee. We cover the entire metropolitan area of Alicante and nearby towns, ensuring speed and cleanliness in every job.
Index.seo_h3_3: Blinds in Elche, Benidorm and Torrevieja
Index.seo_p_4: Our coverage spans a large part of the Alicante province, with a special focus on Elche, Benidorm, and Torrevieja. We know that each area has its own peculiarities, such as high sun exposure and salinity on the coast of Benidorm and Torrevieja, or the specific needs of large villas and apartments in Elche. If you live on the Costa Blanca, we are close by to advise you and offer made to measure blinds that will stand the test of time, with the convenience that we speak both Spanish and English to serve the entire expat community.
Index.process_1_desc: Fill out the form or call us
Index.process_4_desc: We visit your home to take measures
Index.review_1_text: Un servicio excelente. Vinieron a tomar medidas y a la semana siguiente ya tenía mis estores instalados. Muy limpios y profesionales.
Index.review_2_text: Great service from start to finish. They spoke English perfectly and the motorized blinds look fantastic in my villa.
Index.review_3_text: Me recomendaron los estores screen para el sol de la tarde y ha sido un acierto total. Se nota la bajada de temperatura en el salón.
Index.coverage_desc: We provide measuring and installation services in the main towns of the Alicante province and Costa Blanca:
Index.coverage_areas: Alicante · Elche · Benidorm · Torrevieja · Dénia · Santa Pola · Guardamar · Altea · Calpe · Villajoyosa
Index.faq_1_q: Do you supply and install made to measure blinds in Alicante?
Index.faq_1_a: Yes, we specialise in both. We supply made to measure blinds from nuestros talleres, and our technical team handles the professional installation at your home in Alicante and the entire province.
Index.faq_2_q: How much does blind installation cost in Alicante?
Index.faq_2_a: The installation cost is usually included in our final quote for your convenience. The price varies depending on the number of blinds and their size, which is why we offer free, no-obligation custom quotes.
Index.faq_3_q: Do you cover Elche, Benidorm, Torrevieja and the Costa Blanca?
Index.faq_3_a: Absolutely. We cover the entire Costa Blanca. We carry out weekly installations in Elche, Benidorm, Torrevieja, Dénia, Santa Pola, and many other towns in the province.
Index.faq_4_q: What is the difference between screen and blackout roller blinds?
Index.faq_4_a: Screen blinds are micro-perforated; they allow you to see outside and let natural light in while blocking heat and UV rays. Blackout blinds, on the other hand, block 100% of the light, offering total darkness and maximum privacy, making them ideal for bedrooms.
Index.faq_5_q: Do you have no-drill blinds for rental apartments?
Index.faq_5_a: Yes, we have innovative drill-free fixing systems that do not damage the frame or the wall. They are the perfect option for rental properties in Alicante where making holes is not allowed.
Index.faq_6_q: Can I see fabric samples before ordering?
Index.faq_6_a: Of course. When our technician visits your home to take measurements, they always bring physical catalogues and fabric samples so you can see and feel the materials before making a decision.
Index.cta_final_desc: Request a free quote with no obligation today.
Index.service_1_alt: Custom roller blinds installed in Alicante
Index.service_2_alt: Fiberglass screen blind for bright living room in Alicante
Index.service_3_alt: Blackout roller blinds for bedroom in Alicante
Index.service_4_alt: Motorized smart blinds for large windows
Index.service_6_alt: Custom made perfect wave curtains for living room

Footer.about: Professional installation of made to measure blinds and curtains across the province of Alicante. Free no-obligation quote with home visit.
Footer.tagline: Your trusted installer on the Costa Blanca

EstoresEnrollables.h1: Made to Measure Roller Blinds in Alicante
EstoresEnrollables.description: Roller blinds made to measure and installed in your home. Over 200 fabrics available. Installation included throughout the Alicante province.
EstoresEnrollables.feature_1_desc: Each blind is manufactured to the exact measurements of your window.
EstoresEnrollables.feature_2_desc: Wide catalogue of colours, textures and opacities.
EstoresEnrollables.feature_3_desc: Washable fabrics resistant to the passage of time.
EstoresEnrollables.feature_4_desc: Our professionals install it in your home at no extra cost.
EstoresEnrollables.benefits_title: Key Advantages of Our Roller Blinds
EstoresEnrollables.benefit_1: Maximum versatility — they adapt to any decorative style.
EstoresEnrollables.benefit_2: Adjustable light control depending on the blind position.
EstoresEnrollables.benefit_3: They take up very little space and are ideal for small windows.
EstoresEnrollables.step_1_desc: We come to your home to take exact measurements.
EstoresEnrollables.step_2_desc: Your blind is made to measure in the our workshops.
EstoresEnrollables.step_3_desc: We return to your home and install the blind in under 30 minutes.
EstoresEnrollables.benefit_1_desc: Our blinds regulate light and heat entry, helping you save on air conditioning and protecting your furniture from UV rays.
EstoresEnrollables.benefit_2_desc: Choose the optimal openness and transparency level. Keep your rooms private without giving up the natural light you want.
EstoresEnrollables.benefit_3_desc: We handle professional measurement and installation with millimeter precision. We ensure every blind fits flawlessly.
EstoresEnrollables.faq_title: Frequently Asked Questions about Roller Blinds
EstoresEnrollables.faq_1_q: How do I choose the right fabric for my roller blind?
EstoresEnrollables.faq_1_a: It depends on your light and privacy needs: screen blinds are perfect for light and outside view; translucent blinds soften light without direct visibility; and blackout blinds block 100% of light, ideal for bedrooms.
EstoresEnrollables.faq_2_q: Does the price include home measurement and installation in Alicante?
EstoresEnrollables.faq_2_a: Yes, our quotes are final and include the complete technical service: we visit your home to verify measurements and, once made, perform the professional assembly with no hidden costs.
EstoresEnrollables.faq_3_q: Can roller blinds be installed without drilling holes?
EstoresEnrollables.faq_3_a: Absolutely. We offer no-drill blinds that fit onto window frames with clips or heavy-duty adhesive supports, perfect for PVC windows and rental properties.
EstoresEnrollables.faq_4_q: What maintenance and cleaning do they require?
EstoresEnrollables.faq_4_a: Maintenance is minimal. Most technical fabrics (like screen or polyester) repel dust and can be cleaned easily with a damp cloth and mild soap, without taking the blind down.
EstoresEnrollables.reviews_title: What our customers say about their custom blinds
EstoresEnrollables.review_1_text: The 5% screen roller blinds they installed in my living room in Alicante are perfect. Plenty of light comes in but it doesn't heat up the room.
EstoresEnrollables.review_2_text: We bought blackout roller blinds for the bedrooms in our flat in Elche. Complete darkness at night, perfect for resting.
EstoresEnrollables.review_3_text: The no-drill system is wonderful. We installed them in our rental apartment in Torrevieja and they took 10 minutes to set up.

CortinasEnrollables.step_3_desc: Professional installation included in the price.

Presupuesto.h1: Request a Made to Measure Quote
Presupuesto.description: Fill in the form and we will send you a personalised quote within 24 hours. No obligation.
Presupuesto.message_placeholder: Tell us what you need: number of windows, approximate measurements, etc.
Presupuesto.trust_1_desc: No obligation and no hidden costs.
Presupuesto.trust_2_desc: We will contact you within one business day.
Presupuesto.trust_3_desc: The price includes measurement, manufacturing and installation.

QuienesSomos.hero_subtitle: We are a local team of professional installers of made-to-measure blinds and curtains in the province of Alicante. We work with the best manufacturers to deliver top quality.
QuienesSomos.local_desc_1: Our team consists of professionals with years of experience installing blinds, curtains, and solar protection systems across the province of Alicante.
QuienesSomos.local_desc_2: We know every corner of the Costa Blanca: from the city center of Alicante to Elche, Benidorm, Torrevieja, and surrounding areas. This allows us to offer a close, fast, and personalized service.
QuienesSomos.manufacturer_desc_1: As an independent shop in Alicante for curtains and blinds, we offer solutions from the best national manufacturers, collaborating closely with leading brands like Corticolors to guarantee the highest quality in fabrics and systems.
QuienesSomos.manufacturer_desc_2: Each blind and curtain is custom-made under strict quality controls, allowing us to bring solar protection and decoration excellence to your home with unbeatable local service.
QuienesSomos.manufacturer_quote: Over 20 years manufacturing high-quality blinds and curtains for professionals all over Spain.
QuienesSomos.manufacturer_benefit_2: Wide range of fabrics and colors
QuienesSomos.value_1_desc: Every measurement, every detail matters. We make sure the result is perfect.
QuienesSomos.value_2_desc: We only work with premium materials that guarantee long durability.
QuienesSomos.value_3_desc: We are your neighbor. We assist you personally and directly.
QuienesSomos.value_4_desc: We support eco-friendly fabrics and responsible manufacturing processes.
QuienesSomos.step_1_desc: Contact us and we will prepare a personalized quote without obligation within 24 hours.
QuienesSomos.step_2_desc: A professional will visit your home to take exact measurements and advise you on fabrics and styles.
QuienesSomos.step_3_desc: Your order is custom-made in our workshops with the materials and finishes you chose.
QuienesSomos.step_4_desc: Our team installs the blinds in your home, leaving everything perfect and fully operational.
QuienesSomos.cta_desc: Request your quote without obligation and find out why we are the trusted team for custom blinds in Alicante.

Blog.post_3_excerpt: Discover why more and more homes in Alicante are choosing motorised blinds and how they improve your daily life.

Blog.post_4_excerpt: Everything you need to know about blinds that install without making holes in the wall.
Blog.post_5_excerpt: Practical tips to keep your blinds looking like new for years.
Blog.post_6_title: Blinds buying guide for expats in Alicante
Blog.post_6_excerpt: A practical guide for English-speaking residents looking for made to measure blinds in the Costa Blanca.
Blog.cta_post_title: Want the perfect blind for your living room?
Blog.cta_post_subtitle: Request a free home visit in the Alicante province. We measure with no obligation and show you physical fabric samples on your own window.
Blog.post_7_title: Difference between translucent and screen blinds: Which to choose?
Blog.post_7_excerpt: Learn in detail the difference between translucent and screen blinds to help you choose the best sun protection and privacy option.

Cookies.title: Cookie Control
Cookies.text: We use our own and third-party cookies to analyze our services and show you advertising related to your preferences based on a profile compiled from your browsing habits. You can configure or reject cookies by clicking on the corresponding button.

ContactForm.title: Request your free quote
ContactForm.subtitle: Fill out the form below and we will contact you within 24 hours.
ContactForm.name: Full Name
ContactForm.details: Tell us which products you're interested in and the measurements (optional)
ContactForm.details_placeholder: e.g. I need 2 screen blinds for the living room, approx 150x200cm...
ContactForm.success: Message sent successfully! We will contact you soon.
